overview.title: Team Overview
overview.description: Manage collaborative agent teams, track provisioned roles, and open each team workspace from here.

create.title: Create Team
create.description: Create a team from a TeamSkill package, or manually select existing agents.
create.modalDescription: Load a team from TeamSkill, or build one from existing agents and choose a Leader.
create.packagePathPlaceholder: Select or enter a TeamSkill directory or archive path
create.teamSkillDefinitionDescription: The package is the source of truth for the leader, roles, workflow, and dependencies. One TeamSkill name/version can only have one team instance.
create.manualDefinitionDescription: Select existing agents and choose exactly one Leader.
create.manualSelectedEmpty: Add at least one agent from the left.
create.manualAgentWorkspaceRequired: Selected agent needs a workspace before it can join: {{agentName}}
create.existingTeamDetected: This TeamSkill version already has a team. Open the existing team instead of creating a duplicate.
create.versionChangeDescription: Current version {{currentVersion}} will be replaced by {{incomingVersion}}. The team row is kept and old run history is cleared.
create.confirmReplacement: I understand this will replace the current TeamSkill version for this team.
create.requiredDependencyBlocker: Required dependencies are missing. Resolve required skills or configure required tools before continuing.
create.noAutomaticInstallSource: This source is not a ClawHub install source. Open it, download the Skill, then import it locally.

run.emptyRuns: No runs yet. Create a run, then open the leader session and send a message to run it.
run.createFirstRunHint: This team has no run yet. Create a run, then open the leader session and send a message.
run.exportYamlNoGraph: Create or load a graph before exporting YAML.
run.exportYamlFailed: Could not export the graph YAML. Try again.

graphCanvas.configureHint: Click a node or edge on the canvas to configure it.
graphCanvas.edgeJoinGateHint: JoinNode with multiple inbound edges should use gate; otherwise any one arriving edge releases it.
graphCanvas.joinConfigurationHint: Join nodes only merge upstream edges; join conditions are controlled by edge actions and input ports.
graphCanvas.endConfigurationHint: End nodes only mark the workflow terminal point. If the leader must summarize, add a Leader Work node before End.
graphCanvas.saveGraphUnavailable: Graph save is not available for this view.
graphCanvas.startWebhookPublicBaseUrlHint: The local runtime-host route is reachable only from this machine or networks that can reach it. To configure a website webhook, expose it through a reverse proxy, tunnel, or deployed gateway, then paste that public HTTPS base URL here. MatchaClaw does not automatically expose your local port.
graphCanvas.startWebhookPublicBaseUrlInvalid: Public ingress base URL must be an http:// or https:// URL.
graphCanvas.startWebhookPublicUrlUnavailable: Shown after you enter a public ingress URL
graphCanvas.startWebhookPathPreviewHint: Send POST requests with this token; this route uses the path only, so active webhook paths must be unique.
graphCanvas.startTriggerHint: The start node defines this workflow's external trigger entry; webhook requests are received by runtime-host.

nodePaletteDescriptions.start: External trigger entry for the workflow (webhook or schedule).
nodePaletteDescriptions.work: Role step rendered as a TeamRun attempt.
nodePaletteDescriptions.scriptReview: Runtime rule or script review gate.

run.emptyWorkflow: Leader has not submitted a workflow plan yet

dependencyMissing.title: Dependencies required before this run can continue
dependencyMissing.description: Required dependencies cannot be bypassed. Install missing skills or configure missing tools, then retry the dependency check.
dependencyMissing.noAutomaticInstallSource: This source is not a ClawHub install source. Open it, download the Skill, then import it locally.
dependencyMissing.requiredToolBlocker: Required tools must be configured in OpenClaw before this run can continue.
dependencyMissing.retryAfterInstall: Retry after installing missing dependency skills.
dependencyMissing.retryNote: Retry dependency preflight after resolving dependencies.
dependencyMissing.abortNote: Abort due to unresolved TeamSkill dependencies.
